description.ko: 진한 보라색, 중력 렌즈 효과, 그리고 심연의 규모에 초점을 맞춘 블랙홀 가장자리의 우주적 탐사입니다.
description.en: A cosmic exploration of a black hole's edge, focusing on deep purples, gravitational lensing, and the scale of the abyss.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-realistic wide shot of VOID-3, titled 'The Singularity's Veil.' A massive, ancient monolithic gate floats near a black hole's event horizon. Swirling #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo gravitational gases spiral into a #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds drift in the background. Gravitational lensing distorts the light of distant stars. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, capturing the silent, terrifying majesty of the infinite universe.
